Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1.  **Understand the Goal**: The user wants a comprehensive event log for process mining based on several provided ERP tables (Orders, Order Lines, Delivery, Invoice, Payments). The output must be in Markdown table format with columns: Case ID, Activity Name, Timestamp, Resource (optional but recommended), and Other Attributes.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: **Case ID Strategy**: The prompt explicitly says: Identify Cases: Use the order_id as the case identifier for each process instance. So, Case ID = order_id.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: **Tables & Events Mapping**: Orders Table: Event: Order Created. Timestamp: order_date. Resource: sales_person_id. Order Lines Table: Event: Item Picked. Timestamp: item_picking_date. Resource: picker_id. Delivery Table: Order Dispatched and Order Arrived. Invoice Table: Invoice Issued. Payments Table: Payment Received.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1002: multiple picks, multiple dispatches and arrivals, multiple invoices and payments. Order 1003: picks after create, then dispatch arrive invoice pay. Order 1004: only create and pick, missing others. Order 1005: full sequence.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: 4.  **Refining Columns and Formatting**: Activity Name: Order Created, Item Picked with item details in attributes, Order Dispatched, Order Arrived, Invoice Issued, Payment Received. Resource: Map IDs to names using Resources table, e.g. Alice Brown (SP-001). Other Attributes: customer, item id quantity, carrier notes, invoice amount, payment method.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: 5.  **Sorting**: Primary Sort: Case ID (Order ID) Secondary Sort: Timestamp

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 6.  **Constructing the Final Table**: Generate rows for every single event found. *Self-Correction during generation*: Ensure timestamps are sorted correctly within cases.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: **Self-Correction on Payment Resource**: The Payment table doesnt have a user ID... For Resource, populate where explicit. For Payment, use payment_method as attribute and System or Method related.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 7.  **Final Review of Requirements**: One row per event. Case ID = order_id. Activities derived. Timestamps mapped. Combined data. Enriched resources.
